dominants.dominant_desc:
Early game Atlas is mainly a zoning tank, do not risk dying before Lv.4.

Mid game is where Atlas shines. One good Fatal Links can snowball the game instantly.

In late game, Atlas is the key playmaker. Proper initiation or peel decides whether your team wins or loses the fight.

data.title: ATLAS  GGWP ENEMY HEADACHE

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Atlas and Yve create an unstoppable combo because Atlas excels at locking enemies in place with Fatal Links while Yve controls the battlefield with her Real World Manipulation

Atlas initiates by diving into the enemy team and pulling them together Yve then casts her ultimate covering the area with high damage and slow effects making it impossible for enemies to escape

The synergy ensures that enemies are trapped within Yve damage zone leading to a devastating team fight advantage with almost no counterplay once caught

Atlas and Aurora form a powerful combo because Atlas can initiate fights by pulling enemies together using his ultimate while Aurora follows up with her freeze and burst damage

Atlas engages with Fatal Links dragging multiple enemies into one spot Aurora immediately uses her passive freeze and ultimate to deal massive damage ensuring the enemies cannot escape

This combo is deadly in team fights as it locks down multiple opponents at once allowing your team to finish them off easily making it one of the strongest wombo combos in the game

Atlas and Nova create a devastating combo because Atlas can gather multiple enemies with his ultimate while Nova follows up with her area burst damage and crowd control

Atlas engages with Fatal Links pulling enemies together Nova then activates her abilities dealing massive damage and applying additional control effects making it nearly impossible for enemies to escape

This synergy is powerful in team fights because it locks down opponents while maximizing area damage allowing the team to secure kills quickly and dominate battles

Atlas and Gatotkaca form a powerful combo because Atlas can initiate fights by pulling enemies together while Gatotkaca follows up with his ultimate to stun them

Atlas uses Fatal Links to gather enemies into one spot making them vulnerable Gatotkaca then jumps in with Avatar of the Guardian knocking them up and dealing massive area damage

This combination is highly effective in team fights because it disrupts enemy formations locks them in place and allows the team to eliminate key targets efficiently

Atlas and Minsitthar create a deadly combo because Atlas can pull enemies together while Minsitthar locks them in place with his ultimate

Atlas uses Fatal Links to gather enemies and reposition them making them vulnerable then Minsitthar follows up with King s Calling preventing them from using dashes and blink skills ensuring they stay trapped

This synergy is powerful in team fights as it limits enemy mobility forces them to fight in a confined space and gives the team a huge advantage in crowd control and damage output

Atlas and Guinevere form a devastating combo because Atlas can gather enemies together while Guinevere follows up with her airborne combo for massive damage

Atlas uses Fatal Links to pull multiple enemies into one spot making them vulnerable then Guinevere jumps in with Spatial Migration knocking them airborne and chaining her skills for a deadly burst

This synergy is highly effective in team fights as it ensures crowd control and burst damage securing easy kills and disrupting the enemy formation

Atlas and Ixia form a powerful combo because Atlas can group enemies together while Ixia takes advantage of their positioning to unleash her full damage potential

Atlas uses Fatal Links to pull multiple enemies into a tight space making them easy targets for Ixia barrage of shots from her ultimate making it difficult for them to escape

This synergy is extremely effective in team fights as it ensures enemies stay within Ixia attack range maximizing her damage output and allowing the team to wipe out opponents efficiently

Atlas and Beatrix form a deadly combo because Atlas can lock multiple enemies in one place while Beatrix unleashes her powerful burst damage

Atlas uses Fatal Links to pull enemies together making them easy targets for Beatrix who can choose Renner for a high-damage snipe or Bennett for an explosive area attack

This synergy is highly effective in team fights as it ensures enemies are immobilized allowing Beatrix to maximize her damage output and quickly eliminate key targets giving the team a huge advantage in engagements

Atlas and Ling form a deadly combo because Atlas can gather enemies together while Ling swiftly eliminates them with his burst damage and mobility

Atlas engages with Fatal Links pulling multiple enemies into one spot making them vulnerable then Ling follows up with Tempest of Blades dealing massive area damage and finishing off weakened targets

This synergy is highly effective in team fights as Atlas controls the battlefield while Ling dives in and out effortlessly securing kills and creating chaos among enemy formations

Atlas and Benedetta form a powerful combo because Atlas can lock down multiple enemies while Benedetta dashes through them with her high burst damage

Atlas initiates with Fatal Links pulling enemies together and making them vulnerable then Benedetta follows up with Alecto Final Blow slashing through the grouped enemies while repositioning safely

This synergy is highly effective in team fights as Atlas controls the battlefield while Benedetta takes advantage of the immobilized enemies dealing continuous damage and eliminating key targets with her mobility

Atlas and Kadita form a deadly combo because Atlas can trap enemies while Kadita bursts them down with her powerful magic damage

Atlas initiates with Fatal Links pulling multiple enemies together and making them vulnerable then Kadita follows up with Rough Waves dealing massive area damage and diving through enemies with Breath of the Ocean

This synergy is extremely effective in team fights because Atlas ensures enemies cannot escape while Kadita delivers her full combo wiping out squishy targets and disrupting enemy formations

Atlas and Alpha form a strong combo because Atlas can lock enemies in place while Alpha continuously deals damage and lifesteals through the fight

Atlas engages with Fatal Links pulling enemies together making them easy targets then Alpha follows up with Alpha Charge to dive in and unleash his combo applying True Damage and lifesteal with his passive

This synergy is highly effective in extended fights as Atlas provides control while Alpha sustains himself dealing continuous damage and overwhelming enemies with his durability and regeneration

Atlas and Badang create a highly effective combo because Atlas can pull multiple enemies together while Badang traps them inside his wall and deals massive burst damage

Atlas uses Fatal Links to gather enemies in one spot making them unable to escape then Badang follows up with Fist Crack unleashing a barrage of punches while enemies are trapped against his wall

This synergy is extremely efficient in team fights because Atlas ensures enemies stay in place while Badang maximizes his full damage potential quickly eliminating multiple targets

Atlas and Vexana form a powerful combo because Atlas can group enemies together while Vexana follows up with her powerful area burst damage and crowd control

Atlas uses Fatal Links to pull multiple enemies into one spot making them vulnerable then Vexana casts Cursed Oath marking key targets and follows up with Nether Snare for massive area damage

This synergy is highly effective in team fights because Atlas ensures enemies are locked down while Vexana maximizes her full damage potential creating chaos and securing kills efficiently

counters.counter_desc:
Diggie is one of the biggest counters to Atlas because his Time Journey ultimate makes allies immune to crowd control completely nullifying Atlas Fatal Links This means Atlas cannot effectively engage in team fights if Diggie times his ultimate correctly

Additionally Diggie Auto Alarm Bombs can zone Atlas and disrupt his positioning Even if Atlas catches Diggie he can still provide vision and annoy enemies in Egg Mode after dying

However Atlas can still be effective if he baits Diggie ultimate before using Fatal Links

Valentina is a strong counter to Atlas because she can steal his Fatal Links using I Am You allowing her to initiate just as effectively as Atlas If Valentina times it well she can turn Atlas own engage against his team creating a massive threat

Additionally Valentina gains movement speed when damaging enemies with skills making it easier for her to avoid Atlas crowd control However Atlas can still counter her by waiting for Valentina to steal another ultimate before using Fatal Links

Kaja is a strong counter to Atlas because he can use Divine Judgment to isolate Atlas before he engages preventing him from using Fatal Links effectively

If Atlas tries to initiate Kaja can instantly suppress him pulling him away from his team and making him an easy target for focus fire This prevents Atlas from executing his combo and forces him to play more cautiously

However Atlas can still be effective by waiting for Kaja to use Divine Judgment on another target before engaging

Grock is a strong counter to Atlas because he can use Guardian s Barrier to block Atlas from engaging or interrupt his Fatal Links combo

If Atlas tries to initiate Grock can instantly place a wall to stop his movement or separate him from his team making it hard for Atlas to execute his full combo Grock also has high durability and crowd control immunity when near walls allowing him to resist Atlas crowd control

However Atlas can still be effective by baiting Grock wall first before engaging

Franco is a strong counter to Atlas because he can use Iron Hook to pull Atlas away before he engages or interrupt Fatal Links with Bloody Hunt

If Atlas tries to initiate Franco can instantly suppress him with Bloody Hunt preventing him from activating his combo Franco can also hook Atlas when he tries to escape after engaging making him an easy target for the enemy team

However Atlas can still be effective by waiting for Franco to use his skills first before engaging in fights

Minsitthar is a strong counter to Atlas because his King s Calling ultimate prevents Atlas from using Flicker or escaping after engaging, making him an easy target for follow-up attacks

If Atlas tries to initiate Minsitthar can cast his ultimate forcing Atlas to fight inside the zone without mobility and making it harder for him to reposition after Fatal Links Minsitthar s second skill can also interrupt Atlas combos with its knockback effect

However Atlas can still be effective by waiting for Minsitthar to waste his ultimate before engaging

Akai is a strong counter to Atlas because his Heavy Spin ultimate can disrupt Atlas initiation and prevent him from properly executing Fatal Links

If Atlas tries to engage Akai can activate Heavy Spin to push him away and scatter the enemy team making it difficult for Atlas to pull multiple enemies together Akai can also use his ultimate to trap Atlas against a wall stopping him from escaping after engaging

However Atlas can still be effective by waiting for Akai to use Heavy Spin first before initiating a fight

Belerick is a soft counter to Atlas because his Passive Deadly Thorns punishes Atlas for engaging by reflecting damage whenever he is attacked Belerick s ultimate Wrath of Dryad also immobilizes enemies in a large area making it difficult for Atlas to escape after using Fatal Links

If Atlas initiates Belerick can activate his ultimate immediately rooting Atlas and his team while dealing continuous damage This forces Atlas to take high damage and prevents him from easily repositioning after his combo

However Atlas can still be effective by waiting for Belerick to waste his ultimate first before engaging or by using Purify to escape the root effect

dominants.dominant_desc:
Here is an advanced trick for playing Atlas that many players do not expect

Activate Perfect Match first then use Flicker before Fatal Links pull animation begins This allows you to relocate instantly while still pulling enemies surprising them completely

Why is this effective

Enemies will not see it coming since they expect Flicker after the pull
You can reposition deep into the enemy team or drag enemies under your tower unexpectedly
The extra mobility from Perfect Match ensures a safe escape after executing the combo

This trick works best in team fights where enemies clump together Try it out and watch your opponents panic
dominants.dominant_title: Early game focus on farming avoid fights and secure vision  Mid game rotate help teammates and secure objectives  Late game stick with team control lord and pick off enemies

emblems.emblem_desc: Flicker is the best battle spell for Atlas as it allows him to reposition quickly for better Fatal Links execution. This spell helps him initiate fights by surprising enemies or escaping dangerous situations. A common technique is to activate Fatal Links, then use Flicker to extend its range, ensuring more enemies are caught in the pull. Proper timing and positioning are key to maximizing its effectiveness in team fights.
emblems.emblem_title: The best emblem for Atlas is the Tank Emblem, as it provides durability, HP, and resistance, making him more effective in frontline engagements. You can also use the Support Emblem if you want extra m

equips.equip_desc:
Rapid Boots Conceal provides additional movement speed allowing Atlas to engage or escape easily The Conceal effect is useful for surprising enemies

Antique Cuirass reduces incoming physical damage when attacked making Atlas more durable in fights

Fleeting Time reduces Ultimate cooldown enabling Atlas to use Fatal Links more frequently

Dominance Ice lowers enemy attack speed and shield effective against fighters and marksmen

Athenas Shield reduces magic damage received useful against mages

Immortality grants resurrection increasing survivability in team fights

hero.hero_overview: Atlas is a powerful tank hero specializing in crowd control and initiation. As the guardian of the Abyss, he thrives in disrupting enemy formations and setting up plays for his team. His Perfect Match skill enhances mobility, while Fatal Links can turn the tide of battle by pulling multiple enemies together. Playing Atlas requires good positioning and awareness to maximize his impact.
hero.hero_strength:
Excellent crowd control with Fatal Links.
		High durability, making him an ideal frontliner.
		Strong initiation and zoning abilities in team fights.
		Perfect Match allows for both engaging and escaping effectively.
hero.hero_weakness:
Highly dependent on Flicker for effective ultimates.
		Struggles against heroes with crowd control immunity (e.g., Purify users).
		Can be kited easily by ranged heroes.
		Requires good timing and coordination to maximize effectiveness.

data.recommend: WHAT BUILD,EMBLEM,TRICK,BEST COMBO AND COUNTER TO ATLAS KING OF SMACKDOWN LAND OF DAWN!

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is the best battle spell for Atlas as it allows him to reposition quickly for better Fatal Links execution. This spell helps him initiate fights by surprising enemies or escaping dangerous situations. A common technique is to activate Fatal Links, then use Flicker to extend its range, ensuring more enemies are caught in the pull. Proper timing and positioning are key to maximizing its effectiveness in team fights.

THIS IS NOT A TROLLING BUILD!

Atlas nowaday is not good enough to be a vanguard, his skill do work as initiator but he rely too much on his teamates. Even his passive didnt do him any justice 

Random player CAN be annoying and sometimes didnt follow your initiation. Hence why this build MIGHT be a solution.

I already test him out, and let's say he is pretty good if you know how to play him.

Being able to clear minion by himself
